title: TemplateCreate
description: Request body for creating a REST module template

module_id.description: ID of the parent REST module

uri_prefix.description: URI pattern for the template. Supports path parameters using :name syntax and optional parameters using :name? suffix.

priority.description: Priority for evaluating the template when multiple templates match. 0 is lowest, 9 is highest.

etag_type.description: Type of entity tag generation for cache validation and optimistic locking

etag_query.description: SQL query used to generate the entity tag when etag_type is QUERY

run_mode.description: Set to 'codePreview' to return the PL/SQL code instead of executing it
